title: exochorda racemosa subsp. giraldii
intro: Exochorda racemosa subsp. giraldii is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae, commonly known as the dwarf or Chinese exochorda. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Exochorda racemosa subsp. giraldii include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Exochorda racemosa subsp. giraldii typically involve drying the flowers and leaves to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can also be used topically for skin conditions.
